compatibility_note: Split-aligned RouteLLM-style pairwise data substrate. This is not an official RouteLLM MF/BERT fitted result.

schema.model_a_utility: RouteCode utility for the configured strong model
schema.model_b_utility: RouteCode utility for the configured weak model
schema.winner: model_a if strong utility is higher, model_b if weak utility is higher, else tie
